properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: Oh, will you come? Oh, will you come? Jesus will save every one; Oh, beware! Don’t you see there is pardon for thee? Mercy is calling you home.

verse.name: v3
v4
v5
verse.lines: Will you come? He will save; how He pleads with you now! — Jesus had mercy on me— He’s the best friend you have, oh, be humble and bow! Mercy is calling for thee.
